name: Chicken and Fresh Vegetable Provencale
recipeInstructions:
1. Break the cauliflower into small pieces.
2. Combine vegetables in a 3-quart baking dish.
3. Sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley, diced leaf basil, and pepper.
4. Dissolve bouillon cube and boiling water together; pour over vegetables.
5. Make paste by combining chopped fresh parsley, diced leaf basil, garlic powder, and lemon juice.
6. Place the chicken pieces over the vegetables.
7. Spread the paste on top of the chicken.
8. Cover and bake at 350°F for 1.5 hours or until the chicken and vegetables are tender, basting occasionally.
